product.name: Master Kong Iced Black Tea
selling_points: Cool and refreshing for hot days.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Feeling overheated and thirsty on hot days; most bottled drinks don’t feel instantly cooling or special.
creative_strategy.promise: A ready-to-drink iced black tea that delivers a cool, crisp moment of refreshment—elevated and satisfying the instant you pick it up.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: A restrained, design-led product hero treatment elevates a mainstream bottled tea into a cool, desirable object. With controlled cool-toned lighting, negative space, and a gentle hand interaction, the ad communicates refreshment and quality without risky liquid actions.

candidate_categories.reason: Best fit for elevating the brand with a simple, elegant hero approach. Uses controlled light, slow movement, and negative space to suggest cool refreshment and quality.
candidate_categories.risk: If over-stylized, it may feel distant; must keep the product recognizable and approachable.

candidate_categories.reason: Focuses on bottle form, label, and cap with close-ups; feasible and credible.
candidate_categories.risk: May underplay the ‘refreshing on hot days’ feeling without a human interaction cue.

candidate_categories.reason: Showing a person enjoying the drink outdoors communicates refreshment clearly.
candidate_categories.risk: Environment complexity can strain a small video model; adds props and background continuity risks; less ‘premium’ tone.

candidate_categories.reason: Pouring over ice or showing condensation could dramatize coolness.
candidate_categories.risk: Liquid, ice, and condensation are fragile for small models; transparency and subtle physics reduce feasibility.

creative_design.selling_angle: Instant cool-down in the heat—a crisp, iced black tea moment the moment you lift the bottle.
creative_design.visual_grammar: clean hero placement, cool studio light, negative space, slow camera push-in, gentle hand lift and label-forward hold
creative_design.proof_mechanism: Premium aesthetic + simple, deliberate hand lift and tilt that implies ready-to-drink refreshment without risky liquid actions.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: Quiet hero bottle on a matte dark stone slab under cool, controlled side light.
creative_design.action_arc: Slow push-in; a single hand enters, gently lifts the bottle, tilts it slightly toward camera to suggest refreshment, then settles into a centered label-forward hold.
creative_design.payoff: Composed final product hold with soft edge highlight, label clear and inviting.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: No pouring, ice, or condensation effects. One matte stone surface, one cool background, one hand only. Gentle push-in and small rotation/tilt keep actions robust for a small video model. No new props introduced after the first frame.

character.appearance: Single adult hand with clean, natural skin tone; forearm partially visible.
character.wardrobe: Off-white linen long-sleeve shirt cuff visible at wrist.
character.hair_makeup: No face shown; no makeup needed.
character.performance_style: Calm, deliberate, premium gestures with smooth, unhurried movement.

scene.lighting: Cool, controlled commercial lighting with a soft key from the left, gentle edge highlights, and clean shadows.
scene.background: Seamless matte charcoal gray background with ample negative space.
key_props: Matte dark slate stone slab as the tabletop surface

product.visual_identity: The authentic Master Kong (Kang Shifu) Iced Black Tea bottled drink as in the reference: a plastic bottle with its real label and cap colors, presented upright, label-forward.

single_shot.visual_prompt: Starting from the composed studio scene with the real Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle standing on a matte dark slate stone slab against a seamless matte charcoal gray background, the camera makes a slow, steady push-in under cool, controlled side lighting. After a brief beat, a single right hand with a clean, natural look and the cuff of an off-white linen shirt enters smoothly from frame right. The hand gently grips the bottle at mid-body, lifts it with care, rotates it just enough so the label faces the camera, and tilts it slightly toward the lens as if offering a sip—suggesting a cool, refreshing moment without pouring. The lighting remains calm and refined, catching a soft edge highlight on the bottle. The hand then steadies the bottle in a centered, label-forward hero hold above the slab as the slow push-in continues. End with the bottle steady and composed, quiet and premium, with no additional props introduced and the same background maintained throughout.
single_shot.start_frame_prompt: Create a premium studio tabletop scene featuring the real Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle (from the provided reference) standing upright, label facing camera, on a matte dark slate stone slab. The background is a seamless matte charcoal gray wall with ample negative space. Use cool, controlled commercial lighting with a soft key from the left that creates a gentle edge highlight and clean, soft shadows. Keep the scene minimal and refined: only the bottle, the stone slab, and the plain charcoal background. No glassware, no ice, no condensation effects. No hand or person is visible in this first frame.
single_shot.text: Master Kong Iced Black Tea — Cool and refreshing for hot days.
single_shot.audio: Light, cool ambient pad; a subtle whoosh as the hand lifts the bottle; a soft chime on the final hero hold. No voiceover.
